---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "krrishjayakumar"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

# Storms Analysis

The `storms` dataset in `dplyr` tracks Atlantic basin tropical cyclones. Below is the count of unique named storms per year.

```{r}
#| label: named-storms-plot
#| fig-cap: "Number of named storms per year in the Atlantic basin."
storms %>%
  distinct(year, name) %>%
  count(year) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Frequency of Named Storms",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Unique Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
